zh.Melbury Sampford, Dorset, England: 英國多瑟特梅爾波利 桑普福德

zh.lifeSummary: 當John Mautravers V於1266年出生在英國多瑟特武爾可姆時，他的父親Sir John Mautravers28歲，母親Joan of Woolcombe27歲。他於1289年與Eleanor Gorges在英國林可爾史爾托特爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1341年在他的家鄉享年76歲。

zh-hans.Melbury Abbas, Dorset, England: 英国多瑟特梅爾波利 阿巴斯

zh-hans.Meriden, Warwickshire, England: 英国英格兰瓦維其可爾梅利登
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Mautravers V于1266年出生在英国多瑟特武爾可姆时，他的父亲Sir John Mautravers28岁，母亲Joan of Woolcombe27岁。他于1289年与Eleanor Gorges在英国林可爾史爾托特爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于大约1341年在他的家乡享年76岁。

nameMeanings.name: Mautravers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Matravers
meanings: Norman, English: locative name from Mautravert in Chérencé-le-Héron (Manche).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When John Mautravers V was born in 1266, in Woolcombe, Dorset, England, his father, Sir John Mautravers, was 28 and his mother, Joan of Woolcombe, was 27. He married Eleanor Gorges in 1289, in Tothill, Lincolnshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died about 1341, in his hometown, at the age of 76.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Mautravers V est né en 1266, à Woolcombe, Dorset, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Mautravers, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Joan of Woolcombe, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Eleanor Gorges en 1289, à Tothill, Lincolnshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé environ 1341, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 76 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Mautravers V 1266 in Woolcombe, Dorset, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Mautravers 28 und seine Mutter Joan of Woolcombe 27. Er hat 1289 in Tothill, Lincolnshire, England Eleanor Gorges geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb um 1341 im Alter von 76 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Mautravers V è nato il nel 1266 nel Woolcombe, Dorset, England, il suo padre, Sir John Mautravers, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Joan of Woolcombe, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Eleanor Gorges nel 1289, nel Tothill, Lincolnshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì circa 1341, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 76 anni.

ja.Melbury Abbas, Dorset, England: イギリスドールセトメルブリー アッバス

ja.lifeSummary: John Mautravers Vが1266年にイギリスドールセトウルコンベで生まれた時，父Sir John Mautraversは28歳，母Joan of Woolcombeは27歳であった。1289年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアトスイルでEleanor Gorgesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は約1341年に故郷で76歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Mautravers V(이)가 1266년 영국 도르세트 보코브에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Mautravers(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan of Woolcombe(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1289년 영국 링코실르 토스이에서 Eleanor Gorges(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1341년 그의 고향에서 76세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Meriden, Warwickshire, England: Meriden, Wæringscīr, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Mautravers V nasceu em 1266, em Woolcombe, Dorset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Mautravers, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Joan of Woolcombe, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Eleanor Gorges em 1289, em Tothill, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1341, em sua cidade natal, com 76 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Mautravers V родился в 1266 г. в местности вулкомб, дорсет, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Mautravers было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan of Woolcombe, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Eleanor Gorges в 1289 г. в местности тотилл, линколншир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер около 1341 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 76 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Mautravers V nació en 1266, en Woolcombe, Dorset, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Mautravers, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Joan of Woolcombe, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Eleanor Gorges en 1289, en Tothill, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió aproximadamente 1341, en su pueblo, a la edad de 76 años.
